configs.purpose: bounded graph-build smoke model with A<->B non-trivial SCC, C dynamic untargeted descriptor, forward/reverse edge converse, diagnostic preservation, and cycle-group shape classification

semantic_equivalence_statement: This run checks bounded TLA model evidence only. It does not change dependency graph construction, invalidation, recalc semantics, evaluation order, TraceCalc behavior, TreeCalc/CoreEngine behavior, publication semantics, rejection policy, OxFml/OxFunc behavior, pack decisions, or service readiness.
